title: Resonance: Designing Digital Calm
subtitle: A Comprehensive Guide to Nervous-System-Aware Interface Architecture

author.name: The Resonance Design Collective
author.bio: A multidisciplinary collective of UX designers, clinical psychologists, integrative wellness practitioners, and software engineers united by the conviction that digital technology should serve the human nervous system, not exploit it.

narrator.name: TBD — Casting in Progress
narrator.style_notes: Warm, unhurried, contemplative tone. Voice should convey both authority and gentleness — the listener should feel held, not lectured. Pacing should model the spaciousness the book describes. Slight pauses between paragraphs. Natural breath audible but not distracting. Gender-neutral or dual-narrator options under consideration.

casting_requirements.vocal_quality: Warm mid-range, resonant chest voice, minimal vocal fry
casting_requirements.pacing: Deliberately slower than typical audiobook narration — approximately 140-150 words per minute
casting_requirements.emotional_range: Contemplative, gently passionate, occasionally quietly urgent, never aggressive
casting_requirements.technical_comfort: Must be comfortable narrating technical content (code concepts, architecture patterns) with clarity and naturalness

copyright: Copyright © 2026 The Resonance Design Collective. All rights reserved.
license: All rights reserved. No portion of this audiobook may be reproduced without written permission.

cover_art.description: Deep forest green gradient with soft gold typography. The word 'Resonance' rendered in Fraunces display typeface with subtle glass-morphism glow. Organic concentric circles radiate outward from center, suggesting a ripple in still water. Minimal, spacious, calm.

ambient_tracks.title: Morning Phase Ambient

ambient_tracks.title: Deep Focus Drone
ambient_tracks.description: Minimal harmonic drone designed to support sustained concentration

ambient_tracks.description: Gradually decelerating ambient piece mirroring the Night phase transition

accessibility.description_of_visual_content: All references to visual design elements include verbal descriptions sufficient for comprehension without seeing the images
